subject: [PATCH v2 3/6] fs/proc: use softleaf_has_pfn() in pagemap PMD walker

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the pagemap PMD walker by adding a check to ensure that only non-present PMDs that encode a PFN are looked up using softleaf_to_page(). The fix uses the softleaf_has_pfn() function, which matches how non-present PTEs are handled. This prevents crashes when encountering non-present PMD types that do not encode a PFN.
